hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||(j.tool_response&&j.tool_response.filePath)||'';if(f)process.stdout.write(f);}catch(e){}})" | { read -r f; case "$f" in *"apps\\web"*|*apps/web*) (cd apps/web && npx --no-install prettier --write "$f") ;; *"apps\\api"*|*apps/api*) (cd apps/api && npx --no-install prettier --write "$f") ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
